subtitle.ja: 中指の構えから始めます。両手の親指で、中指手前の糸を下から取ります
subtitle.en: Begin with the "Japanese Opening". With both thumbs, pick up from below the near middle-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 両手の中指と小指の糸を全て外します
subtitle.en: Release all strings from both middle fingers and little fingers.

subtitle.ja: 右手人差し指で、右手親指の向こうの糸を2本とも取ります
subtitle.en: With the right index finger, pick up both far thumb strings.

subtitle.ja: 左手親指の糸を、右手親指と人差し指の間と通して右手の甲に垂らします
subtitle.en: Pass the left thumb string between the right thumb and index finger and let it hang over the back of the right hand.

subtitle.ja: 右手親指と人差し指の間にかかっている2本の糸を左手で持ち、左手を引いて完成です
subtitle.en: With the left hand, grasp the two strings that lie between the right thumb and index finger, pull the left hand back, and this completes the figure.
